_info: Afterwork-Events mit konkreten Wochentagen. days: 0=So,1=Mo,...6=Sa. Nur Locations mit echten regelmäßigen Afterwork-Events/Specials.
_note: Cross-checked against highlights.json. Locations NOT in highlights.json listed in _unmatched.
